event_description: Yes. The Hain Celestial Group disclosed an internal investigation by its Audit Committee into distributor/sales channel practices (including alleged "channel stuffing" and improper timing of sales recognition, particularly in its U.S. grocery/snacks business) that led the company to delay filing its FY2016 Form 10-K and to restate previously issued financial statements for fiscal years 2014 and 2015 (and related interim periods). This was accompanied by an SEC inquiry/investigation into the company's revenue recognition and sales practices. Around this period, there were also related finance leadership changes, including the departure of CFO Ira Lamel, amid the accounting issues.
approx_date: 2016-08 (initial disclosure of investigation/delayed 10-K), with restatement and related SEC matters continuing through 2017-2018
